disclaimer: Candidate triage notes are operator scheduling aids and provenance records only. They do not modify candidate scores, posteriors, or pathway routing. Triage notes are not detection claims, discovery announcements, or authorizations for external submission.

notes.note_text: Narrowband signal with borderline drift rate. RFI check pending. Requires expert review before pathway decision.
Frequency matches known satellite transponder band. Off-target presence confirmed. Classifying as RFI.
Strong IR excess, stellar solution quality good, no AGN or dust indicator. Recommend photometric follow-up at multiple epochs.
Cross-match confirms this is a catalogued variable star (Mira type). Archival disappearance is consistent with variability cycle. No technosignature-interest.
Poor photometric quality in WISE band. SED fit residual is marginal. Defer pending additional photometry. No pathway decision yet.
